name: Lumen Bio
oneLiner: Light-activated cancer therapeutics — University of Utah spinout
description: Lumen Bio is a University of Utah spinout commercializing photo-activatable small-molecule oncology therapeutics licensed from the Huntsman Cancer Institute. We just closed a $4M seed and licensed the core IP from PIVOT Center. We need an experienced life-sciences CEO who has navigated FDA 510(k) or PMA pathways and brought a therapeutic from preclinical to first-in-human. Looking for full-time, equity-heavy compensation with a market-rate runway-sized salary. Bonus if you've done life-sci commercialization out of a U.S. academic medical center.

name: Bramble AI
oneLiner: Applied LLMs for K-12 personalized learning
description: Bramble AI is building applied LLM tooling for K-12 personalized-learning platforms — pedagogy-aware tutors that adapt to each student's reading level, prior knowledge, and IEP. Series A coming up. We're 14 people, mostly engineers, and need a fractional GTM advisor with deep enterprise SaaS experience to help us figure out school-district sales motion and pricing. Equity-only fractional advisory ideal.

name: AeroGrid
oneLiner: Hypersonic flight test instrumentation — USU spinout
description: AeroGrid is a Utah State spinout commercializing hypersonic flight test instrumentation. We have a Phase II SBIR with the Air Force and AFWERX TACFI funding through end of 2026. We need a fractional regulatory / government-affairs advisor with ITAR experience and DoD acquisition fluency to help us shape a Phase III pathway. Also looking for a senior hardware engineer.

name: CropVision
oneLiner: Computer vision for crop disease detection — BYU spinout
description: CropVision is a BYU spinout building computer-vision pipelines for early crop-disease detection. We have an LOI from a top-3 ag input company and are about to raise a seed round. Looking for paid summer engineering interns with ML and PyTorch experience. Also interested in a fractional CMO for brand work.

name: Meridian Cyber
description: Meridian Cyber automates continuous red-teaming for cloud-native enterprises using AI agents. We just closed a Series A and are hiring a senior offensive-security engineer (founding-engineer-level role). Heavy equity. Series A-stage Utah company with 12 engineers.

name: LedgerLane
description: LedgerLane builds embedded-payments infrastructure for vertical SaaS companies. We're at pre-seed, looking for a co-founder with deep payments / KYC-AML experience and prior fintech founder background. Equity-heavy.

name: Grayfin Energy
oneLiner: Long-duration grid storage — U of U spinout
description: Grayfin is a U of U spinout commercializing iron-air long-duration grid storage. We have a DOE OCED award and are pre-seed, mostly grant-funded. Looking for an experienced energy-policy and DOE grant-strategy advisor. Mentor-only welcome — we're cash-poor.

name: Altimer Robotics
oneLiner: Advanced manufacturing automation for medical devices
description: Altimer is a Series A advanced-manufacturing company building robotic cell-line automation for medical-device manufacturers. We need a full-time COO who has scaled an ISO 13485 quality system and supply chain in a hardware company.

name: Vellum Dev
description: Vellum Dev is a seed-stage developer-tools startup building code-quality observability for AI-generated code. We're looking for our first sales hire — someone who's done founder-led-to-pipeline at an early-stage Utah dev-tools company. Cash + equity.

name: Clarion Bio
oneLiner: Synthetic-biology fermentation platform — U of U spinout
description: Clarion Bio is a U of U spinout building a synthetic-biology fermentation platform for high-value specialty chemicals. We're at seed, raising Series A in 2026. Need a fractional BD lead to drive pharma and specialty-chemical partnership conversations.
